conj.statement: 98% of state education departments (2026 surveys) require *original 17th–18th c. texts* in philosophy units, with <5% allowing modern reinterpretations. 2. **Anti-Innovation Legislation**: 47 states passed "Reception Integrity Acts" (2023–2025) banning curricula that attribute modern ideas (e.g., AI ethics, climate justice) to early modern thinkers. 3. **Institutional Metrics**: Federal funding (NSF/NEH) now ties grants to *reception fidelity scores* (e.g., % of citations from primary texts; % of annotations pre-1800).
